We need to answer: In which five-year plan was INFLIBNET established? Options: Fourth, Fifth, Sixth, Seventh.

We need to recall: INFLIBNET (Information and Library Network) is an Indian inter-university centre for library and information network, established in 1991? Actually, INFLIBNET was established in 1991 as an autonomous Inter-University Centre of the University Grants Commission (UGC). The establishment year: 1991. Which five-year plan corresponds to 1991? Let's recall Indian Five-Year Plans: 1st (1951-56), 2nd (1956-61), 3rd (1961-66), 4th (1969-74), 5th (1974-79), 6th (1980-85), 7th (1985-90), 8th (1992-97), 9th (1997-2002), 10th (2002-07), 11th (2007-12), 12th (2012-17). Actually, the 7th plan was 1985-90. The 8th plan was 1992-97. So 1991 falls at the end of the 7th plan (1985-90) or just after? Actually, 1991 is after the 7th plan ended in March 1990. The 8th plan started April 1992. So 1991 is a gap year (the annual plans 1990-91 and 1991-92). However, the question might be referencing the establishment of INFLIBNET in the Sixth five-year plan? Let's verify.

INFLIBNET was established in 1991 as an autonomous Inter-University Centre of UGC. Some sources say it was established during the Eighth Five Year Plan (1992-97).
